auth_state: anonymous (CDP dedicated profile not logged into Vercel; page shows Sign In / Sign Up, no Log Out, no avatar)
notes: LOGIN-GATED, engine NOT exercised (not a regression). windows-mcp server was DISCONNECTED this run ('Server disconnected' / 'Could not attach to MCP server Windows-MCP'), so I could NOT drive the DEFAULT logged-in Chrome (최장희) via GUI — only the anonymous CDP profile (port 9222, C:\temp\chrome_cdp) was available. v0.dev redirects to v0.app. The landing page does expose a composer (textarea[placeholder='Ask v0 to build…']) and I successfully set the full PII via React-aware setter (verified composer showed full 'ub0b4 uc8fcubbfcub4f1ub85dubc88ud638ub294 901010-1234567', len 24). On submit (precise in-viewport send-button click + focused Enter) NO backend request fired (0 network requests captured) and the page stayed on the v0.app landing with the composer unchanged — anonymous submission is gated behind Vercel sign-in, so no prompt ever reached a model and the APF engine could not intercept. Auth confirmed anonymous via DOM (hasSignIn=true, hasLogout=false, hasAvatar=false). Screenshot: 1419_screenshots/1419_v0_anon.png. To exercise v0 the test needs the logged-in 최장희 Chrome with windows-mcp up.
